title: LaurentLogExpansion
summary: Models a finite Laurent/log expansion, parity conditions, coefficient support, and logarithmic terms.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Models a finite Laurent/log expansion, parity conditions, coefficient support, and logarithmic terms.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in Ambient/PE/Renormalization/LaurentLogExpansion.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Data/interface: Laurent Log Expansion. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Definition: active Exponents. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Formal proposition: coeff eq zero of lt. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem coeff_eq_zero_of_lt {m : Int} (hm : m < E.lowerBound) : E.coeff m = 0

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: coeff eq zero of gt. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem coeff_eq_zero_of_gt {m : Int} (hm : E.upperBound < m) : E.coeff m = 0

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
